mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exchange_record (exchange_no, after_sales_id, after_sales_no, exchange_status, stock_locked, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{exchangeNo}, #{afterSalesId}, #{afterSalesNo}, #{exchangeStatus}, #{stockLocked}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE exchange_record SET stock_locked = #{stockLocked}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE exchange_record SET exchange_status = #{exchangeStatus}, outbound_logistics_company = #{outboundLogisticsCompany}, outbound_logistics_no = #{outboundLogisticsNo}, shipped_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
